title: CLI, Configuration, Packaging, Scheduling, Overlap, Logs, and Recovery · Language Clinic: Operations Retention Recovery
summary: The script embeds targets and secrets, has ambiguous exit status, runs overlapping cron jobs, writes partial reports, logs content forever, and cannot restore a prior release. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the operations retention recovery increment in installable and operable crawler release candidate. Learners progress th…
objectives: Set log, trace, checkpoint, raw-source, report, personal-data, backup, deletion, incident, restore, and owner policies and rehearse recovery.
Define scheduler identity, timezone, missed runs, overlap, distributed lock, lease expiry, idempotency, signal shutdown, and stale-job recovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-operations-retention-recovery — Set log, trace, checkpoint, raw-source, report, personal-data, backup, deletion, incident, restore, and owner policies and rehearse recovery.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-packaging-scheduling-operations-3
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-packaging-scheduling-operations-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance.
def worked_scraper_packaging_scheduling_operations_3(target_platforms: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, scheduled_runs: int = 12, overlap_incidents: int = 0, restore_minutes: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorizationworked3",
        "url5798",
        "response3dekrow",
        "treeworked35798",
        "frontier5798worked3",
        "report3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if scheduled_runs < 1 or overlap_incidents > 0:
        return False, overlap_incidents, "schedule-overlap"
    if restore_minutes < 0 or restore_minutes > 20:
        return False, restore_minutes, "restore-budget"
    assert clean_installs == target_platforms and overlap_incidents == 0
    return True, clean_installs, "operable-crawler-release"

    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1cdoy2)) == 6
    if target_platforms < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_platforms:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if scheduled_runs < 1 or overlap_incidents > 0:
        return False, overlap_incidents, "schedule-overlap"
    if restore_minutes < 0 or restore_minutes > 20:
        return False, restore_minutes, "restore-budget"
    assert clean_installs == target_platforms and overlap_incidents == 0
    return True, clean_installs, "operable-crawler-release"
